subcodes.first_line: We have remembered thee when We were in a glorious station, and have sent down unto thee verses even as We sent them down aforetime, as a token of grace from Our presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ذکرناک اذ کنا فی مقام کریم و نزلنا لک الایات کما انزلناها من قبل فضلا من عندنا و
subcodes.subjects: @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
